name: slack
description: Slack connector using Bolt — bridges Slack workspace messages to Arqitect brain via Redis

config_fields.name: app_token
config_fields.description: Slack App-Level Token for Socket Mode (xapp-...)

config_fields.name: bot_aliases
config_fields.description: Alternative names the bot responds to

config_fields.name: whitelisted_users
config_fields.description: Slack user IDs allowed to interact

config_fields.name: whitelisted_groups
config_fields.description: Slack channel IDs to process messages from
